creator: gunther.stengl@googlemail.com
text:
Build fails for misc/shared-mime-info_1.0_2

Trying to build misc/shared-mime-info on my package building system, it failed
at configure step because p5-XML-Parser was not present.

Fix: 

I did "portmaster textproc/p5-XML-Parser". After that the build for "portmaster misc/shared-mime-info" worked.

--> Update build dependencies?
How-To-Repeat: Try to build misc/shared-mime-info on a system without textproc/p5-XML-Parser
